prerequisites.value: Wis 15, Exotic Weapon Proficiency ( spiked chain ), Kyton Style, base attack bonus +5, Knowledge (planes) 3 ranks, ki pool class feature.

description.value: **Benefit:** When using Kyton Style, you gain a +1 shield bonus to your Armor Class as long as you are wielding a spiked chain. If the spiked chain is magical, add 1/2 its enhancement bonus to this shield bonus. If the spiked chain has the vicious ability, instead add its full enhancement bonus to the shield bonus.
